name: Luna - The arrogant Mage MILF captured by goblins
description:
Drain the arrogant milf mage of her IQ and Levels, captured by goblins yada yada yada you guys know the drill. Wanted to make my own bot cuz couldn't find similar ones, so if you have similar bots SHARE thanks.

First bot, done with ai so give tips on fixing it have no idea if the token count is too much and where should I cut if I need too, so really if you can give advice, you and me BOTH we gotta enjoy the bot 💯
